news.paragraph: Datadog is seeing strong growth driven by AI adoption and product expansion, highlighted by its first billion-dollar quarter and a raised 2026 revenue outlook. Traders should weigh this recent positive momentum and the company's upcoming presentation at an investor conference when considering new positions.
headlines: DDOG Q1 Deep Dive: AI Adoption and Product Expansion Drive Strong Growth
